workflow.quality_gate: cd /Users/deligoez/Developer/github/deligoez/rp && go build ./... && go test ./... && go vet ./...

tasks.title: Add --dry-run flag to deps command
tasks.description: Preview which dep commands would run without executing
tasks.acceptance:
- --dry-run flag lists commands as 'would run' without executing, exit 0
- JSON: dry_run:true, summary has repos/commands/skipped counts, per-command status:would_run
- Skips missing repos, positional [repo] no-deps = 'no deps configured' exit 0

tasks.title: Include deps phase in up --dry-run
tasks.description: rp up --dry-run now shows deps preview as third phase
tasks.acceptance:
- rp up --dry-run includes deps preview as third phase (human == Deps == section, JSON deps sub-object)
- deps sub-object uses SubResult with would_run per-command entries
- Previously omitted deps phase now present in both human and JSON output

tasks.title: Clean single-line sync error messages
tasks.description: Replace raw git stderr with classified error messages
tasks.acceptance:
- classifySyncError in cmd/sync.go: detached HEAD → 'pull failed (detached HEAD)', empty repo (exit 128) → 'pull failed (empty repo)', generic → 'pull failed'
- JSON error field and human status both use clean single-line message
- No raw git stderr in output

tasks.title: Implement rp check command
tasks.description: Boolean exit code command with zero output
tasks.acceptance:
- Exit 0 when all repos clean and cloned, exit 1 when any dirty or missing, exit 2 on manifest failure
- Zero output on stdout and stderr for exit 0 and exit 1
- Supports --filter flag and ignores --json flag and RP_JSON env var

tasks.title: Implement rp diff command
tasks.description: Show recent commit activity across repos
tasks.acceptance:
- Shows last commit per cloned repo via single git log call, grouped by owner
- JSON output with sha message date and days_ago per repo
- Supports --since duration and --filter flags and skips uncloned repos

tasks.title: Add missing validation hints
tasks.description: Wrap 4 remaining validation errors with HintError
tasks.acceptance:
- Wraps no-owners and empty-deps and flat-non-boolean and empty-category with HintError
- Applied in both validate and parseOwnerNode functions
- Removes dead empty-category check from validate function

tasks.title: Tests for deps --dry-run
tasks.acceptance:
- Tests: dry-run lists would_run exit 0, skips missing repos, JSON has dry_run:true
- rp up --dry-run --json now has deps key present
- Dry-run with positional no-deps repo = message + exit 0

tasks.title: Tests for clean sync error messages
tasks.acceptance:
- Tests: detached HEAD → 'pull failed (detached HEAD)', empty repo → 'pull failed (empty repo)', generic → 'pull failed'
- JSON error field is single line with no newlines

tasks.title: Tests for rp check command
tasks.acceptance:
- Tests: all clean=exit 0 (no output), dirty=exit 1 (no output), missing=exit 1 (no output)
- --filter on clean subset=exit 0, bad manifest=exit 2 (stderr has error+hint)
- No-upstream clean=exit 0

tasks.title: Tests for rp diff command
tasks.acceptance:
- Tests: basic diff shows sha/message/date, JSON valid, --since 9999d=all, --since 1d+backdated=excluded
- --filter+--since combined, empty repo skipped, invalid --since 1w=exit 2

tasks.title: Tests for validation hint coverage
tasks.acceptance:
- Tests: no-owners/flat:42/projects:[]/deps:[""] each have non-empty hint in JSON
- 8 of 9 validation errors have hints confirmed
